steps: To make 100 mL of stock Lactophenol: Combine: 20 mL Phenol Contributed by users 40 mL Glycerine/Glycerol Contributed by users 20 mL Water Contributed by users 20 mL Lactic Acid (85% v/v) Contributed by users
To prepare 100 mL working solution, combine: 100 mL stock Lactophenol 1 mL to 5 mL 1% aqueous aniline blue Contributed by users
creator: Makenzie Whitener
